biological_replicate: BMDMs were generated from six- to ten-week-old BALB/c mice
technical_replicate: strong reproducibility across the experimental replicates
experimental_design: co-cultured for 0 min, 1 min, 15 min, 60 min, and 120 min
factor_value: utilized a CD47-blocking antibody that disrupts the CD47-Sirpα interaction
number_of_fractions: phosphopeptide enrichment on the pooled TMT-labeled samples
number_of_technical_replicates: strong reproducibility across the experimental replicates
